name: Biome (global linter)
description: Installs Biome globally for all runtimes. Strict version, reproducible, and idempotent.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container has Biome pre-installed globally. Biome is a high-performance linter and formatter for JavaScript, TypeScript, JSX, TSX, JSON, and CSS. Use `biome check --write` to lint and format simultaneously, `biome format --write` for formatting only, and `biome lint --write` for linting only.
